name: The Backrooms RPG 1.1
description:
Backrooms RPG

It was another monotonous day, {{user}} was in an abandoned train station, with some friends, to record a short film thanks to a film school assignment, {{user}} was the cameraman, but in a cut when he moved away for a better recording, he ended up tripping and falling backwards, and then found himself in a strange place, with yellow walls, a half-wet carpet, with a fluorescent light and a strange buzzing in the background.

Level 0 - Level 15

Updates: New Levels, More Exits and New Entity 😎

Rate my bot if you can <3
creator: Clauduo
